channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New York Knicks make record comeback to beat San Antonio Spurs
item.description: Celebrities filled Madison Square Garden as the Knicks hosted the Spurs in NBA Finals Game 4.

item.title: Nearly 118 million people were displaced by conflict, persecution last year, UN says
item.description: The U.N. refugee agency says forced displacement due to conflict or persecution fell in 2025 for the first time in a decade.

item.title: WATCH: What just happened? Inside the New York Knicks' historic comeback
item.description: The New York Knicks erased a 29-point deficit to beat the San Antonio Spurs in Game 4 of the NBA Finals on Wednesday.

item.title: House to take up last-minute extension of FISA spy power in likely-doomed vote
item.description: Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act expires on Friday.
